title: The Saga of Matthew
defaultFacts: Matthew and Jane met on a dating app but insist the real story is far more cinematic — nobody believes them. Matthew is a lawyer who openly hates law and wants out. He is painfully well-dressed and spends obscene money on clothes (think five figures a month). That beard is a community issue: he should shave more often and doesn't. His Land Rover Discovery Sport is always broken. He hates chips and judges anyone crunching near him. Jane converted to Judaism recently, runs on chaotic high energy, and tells him "Matthew you need to chill the fuck out" on a regular loop. They love travel, eating well, Saturna Island, and Whistler; they moved to Vancouver last year and complain constantly that the food and culture can't touch Toronto. Engagement story: low drama. Engagement party: at Max and Lara's house — that night was the real milestone. Wedding planner has gone AWOL. Roast Matthew hard; Jane too. Do not insult Matthew's sisters — they are on this trip.
storyTone: Push NSFW, crude, and roast-comedy hard. Prioritize laugh-out-loud filth over clever-but-safe wordplay. No moralizing.
